sql:
WITH counts AS (
    SELECT t.kind_id, COUNT(*) AS c
    FROM title AS t
    GROUP BY t.kind_id
)
SELECT kt.kind, c.c
FROM counts AS c
INNER JOIN kind_type AS kt
  ON kt.id = c.kind_id
ORDER BY c.c DESC, kt.kind;

plan.queryText: WITH seed AS ( SELECT t.id FROM title AS t WHERE t.id = 1 ), level_1 AS ( SELECT s.id, 1 AS depth FROM seed AS s ), level_2 AS ( SELECT t2.id, 2 AS depth FROM seed AS s JOIN title AS t2 ON t2.episode_of_id = s.id ), level_3 AS ( SELECT t3.id, 3 AS depth FROM seed AS s JOIN title AS t2 ON t2.episode_of_id = s.id JOIN title AS t3 ON t3.episode_of_id = t2.id ), level_4 AS ( SELECT t4.id, 4 AS depth FROM seed AS s JOIN title AS t2 ON t2.episode_of_id = s.id JOIN title AS t3 ON t3.episode_of_id = t2.id JOIN title AS t4 ON t4.episode_of_id = t3.id ), episode_chain AS ( SELECT id, depth FROM level_1 UNION ALL SELECT id, depth FROM level_2 UNION ALL SELECT id, depth FROM level_3 UNION ALL SELECT id, depth FROM level_4 ) SELECT COUNT(*) AS traversed_titles, MAX(depth) AS max_depth FROM episode_chain;

sql:
WITH seed AS (
    SELECT t.id
    FROM title AS t
    WHERE t.id = 1
),
level_1 AS (
    SELECT s.id, 1 AS depth
    FROM seed AS s
),
level_2 AS (
    SELECT t2.id, 2 AS depth
    FROM seed AS s
    JOIN title AS t2
      ON t2.episode_of_id = s.id
),
level_3 AS (
    SELECT t3.id, 3 AS depth
    FROM seed AS s
    JOIN title AS t2
      ON t2.episode_of_id = s.id
    JOIN title AS t3
      ON t3.episode_of_id = t2.id
),
level_4 AS (
    SELECT t4.id, 4 AS depth
    FROM seed AS s
    JOIN title AS t2
      ON t2.episode_of_id = s.id
    JOIN title AS t3
      ON t3.episode_of_id = t2.id
    JOIN title AS t4
      ON t4.episode_of_id = t3.id
),
episode_chain AS (
    SELECT id, depth FROM level_1
    UNION ALL
    SELECT id, depth FROM level_2
    UNION ALL
    SELECT id, depth FROM level_3
    UNION ALL
    SELECT id, depth FROM level_4
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS traversed_titles,
       MAX(depth) AS max_depth
FROM episode_chain;

plan.queryText: WITH ranked_titles AS ( SELECT t.id, ak.title, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY t.id ORDER BY ak.id ) AS rn FROM title AS t JOIN aka_title AS ak ON ak.movie_id = t.id ) SELECT id, title FROM ranked_titles WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY id;

sql:
WITH ranked_titles AS (
    SELECT t.id,
           ak.title,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
               PARTITION BY t.id
               ORDER BY ak.id
           ) AS rn
    FROM title AS t
    JOIN aka_title AS ak
      ON ak.movie_id = t.id
)
SELECT id, title
FROM ranked_titles
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY id;

plan.queryText: SELECT base.kind, COUNT(*) AS title_rows FROM ( SELECT t.id, kt.kind FROM title AS t INNER JOIN kind_type AS kt ON kt.id = t.kind_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT mk.movie_id FROM movie_keyword AS mk ) AS kw ON kw.movie_id = t.id WHERE kw.movie_id IS NOT NULL ) AS base GROUP BY base.kind ORDER BY title_rows DESC, base.kind;

sql:
SELECT base.kind,
       COUNT(*) AS title_rows
FROM (
    SELECT t.id,
           kt.kind
    FROM title AS t
    INNER JOIN kind_type AS kt
      ON kt.id = t.kind_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT mk.movie_id
        FROM movie_keyword AS mk
    ) AS kw
      ON kw.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE kw.movie_id IS NOT NULL
) AS base
GROUP BY base.kind
ORDER BY title_rows DESC, base.kind;

plan.queryText: SELECT kt.kind AS kind_bucket, 'known' AS year_bucket, COUNT(*) AS title_count FROM title AS t JOIN kind_type AS kt ON kt.id = t.kind_id WHERE t.production_year IS NOT NULL GROUP BY kt.kind UNION ALL SELECT kt.kind AS kind_bucket, 'unknown' AS year_bucket, COUNT(*) AS title_count FROM title AS t JOIN kind_type AS kt ON kt.id = t.kind_id WHERE t.production_year IS NULL GROUP BY kt.kind UNION ALL SELECT kt.kind AS kind_bucket, 'all_years' AS year_bucket, COUNT(*) AS title_count FROM title AS t JOIN kind_type AS kt ON kt.id = t.kind_id GROUP BY kt.kind UNION ALL SELECT 'all_kinds' AS kind_bucket, 'all_years' AS year_bucket, COUNT(*) AS title_count FROM title AS t;

sql:
SELECT kt.kind AS kind_bucket,
       'known' AS year_bucket,
       COUNT(*) AS title_count
FROM title AS t
JOIN kind_type AS kt
  ON kt.id = t.kind_id
WHERE t.production_year IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY kt.kind
UNION ALL
SELECT kt.kind AS kind_bucket,
       'unknown' AS year_bucket,
       COUNT(*) AS title_count
FROM title AS t
JOIN kind_type AS kt
  ON kt.id = t.kind_id
WHERE t.production_year IS NULL
GROUP BY kt.kind
UNION ALL
SELECT kt.kind AS kind_bucket,
       'all_years' AS year_bucket,
       COUNT(*) AS title_count
FROM title AS t
JOIN kind_type AS kt
  ON kt.id = t.kind_id
GROUP BY kt.kind
UNION ALL
SELECT 'all_kinds' AS kind_bucket,
       'all_years' AS year_bucket,
       COUNT(*) AS title_count
FROM title AS t;

sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM title AS t
JOIN kind_type AS kt
  ON kt.id = t.kind_id
JOIN movie_keyword AS mk
  ON mk.movie_id = t.id
JOIN keyword AS k
  ON k.id = mk.keyword_id
WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
  AND t.id > 100
  AND kt.kind IN ('movie', 'episode')
  AND UPPER(k.keyword) LIKE '%LOVE%'
  AND k.phonetic_code IS NOT NULL;

JOIN title AS t
  ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN company_name AS cn
  ON cn.id = mc.company_id
JOIN company_type AS ct
  ON ct.id = mc.company_type_id
WHERE t.production_year < 2015
  AND cn.country_code IN ('[us]', '[uk]', '[ca]')
  AND ct.kind <> 'distributors'
  AND mc.note IS NOT NULL
  AND UPPER(cn.name) LIKE '%FILM%';

sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM movie_link AS ml
JOIN link_type AS lt
  ON lt.id = ml.link_type_id
JOIN title AS t1
  ON t1.id = ml.movie_id
JOIN title AS t2
  ON t2.id = ml.linked_movie_id
WHERE ml.movie_id <> ml.linked_movie_id
  AND UPPER(lt.link) LIKE '%FOLLOW%'
  AND t1.production_year IS NOT NULL
  AND t2.production_year IS NOT NULL
  AND t1.production_year <= t2.production_year
  AND t1.kind_id = t2.kind_id;
